instruments.title: UV-Vis Spectrophotometer
instruments.description: Essential for measuring absorbance and transmittance to characterize photoactive materials.

instruments.title: High-Speed Centrifuge
instruments.description: Precision component separation by density, critical for advanced sample preparation.

instruments.title: Precision Analytical Balance
instruments.description: Provides mass measurements with sub-milligram accuracy for reagent handling.

instruments.title: Controlled Fume Hood
instruments.description: High-ventilation workspace for safe chemical handling and vapor management.

instruments.title: Advanced Microscopy
instruments.description: Detailed structural observation of crystals at molecular and cellular scales.

instruments.title: Magnetic Stirring Systems
instruments.description: Uniform solution mixing using regulated magnetic fields for consistent reaction kinetics.
